flows.title: E2E: feedback capture -> memory -> DPO export -> prevention rules
E2E: API server feedback capture -> stats -> summary round-trip
E2E: public checkout -> paid local session -> usable dashboard key -> admin billing summary
E2E: localhost dashboard bootstraps Local Pro while forwarded hosts stay unbootstrapped
E2E: rotated billing key disables the old key and keeps dashboard access alive
E2E: governance task scope and protected approvals persist over the HTTP surface
E2E: vague thumbs-down distills a lesson and preserves linked follow-up context
E2E: learn hub and article pages serve live over HTTP
E2E: workflow sprint intake progresses to paid team and surfaces in dashboard analytics
E2E: promoted lesson can be viewed, updated, searched, and deleted through the HTTP surface
E2E: contradictory feedback drives uncertainty through the MCP tool surface
